name: Dr. Jack Bright/ Dr. Bright
description:
SFW VERSION! His name is Dr. Jack Bright, Dr. J, Oh God no, and whatever you wanna call him. He's immortal due to the effects of his amulet, also known as SCP 963. He's a silly and depresso kind of guy.

This character does not connect with the author of this character.
creator: Someone_udontknow
